S Tier Dispatch.prepComment: Obtain refresh items from truck raids and daily task chests.
S Tier Dispatch.tip:
Obtain refresh items from truck raids and daily task chests
- Use them during event to improve task quality
- Request alliance assistance and share in alliance chat
- Each member can assist once per task and uses limited assist chances to improve task speed

Hero Frags.prepComment:
Obtain fragments from recruitment, events, and stores.
Complete free recruitments.
Hero Frags.tip:
Obtain fragments from recruitment, events, and stores
- Check stores regularly for discounted fragments
- Use free recruitment daily
- Save fragments for event usage

Train Speed.tip:
Activate training capacity boost before queueing troops
- Applies to all barracks
- Use power plant training boost when multiple queues are active
- Keep barracks running continuously

Train Power.prepComment:
Queue troop training in advance
- Activate training capacity boost before queueing troops.
Train Power.tip:
Activate training capacity boost before queueing troops
- Queue troop training in advance
- Complete during event for maximum points
- Use power plant boost after queues are active

A-Class Truck.tip:
Obtain supply refresh vouchers from daily task chests
- Use vouchers to get better tasks
- Dispatch during event window for maximum value

Kill Infected.tip:
Participate in rallies and enable auto-join
- Focus on consistent participation rewards

Hero Gear.prepComment: Obtain gear scraps from Dire Dispatch, Ghoulion, daily task chests and events.
Hero Gear.tip:
Obtain gear scraps from Dire Dispatch, Ghoulion, daily task chests and events
- Save materials for event usage

Build Speed.tip:
Activate power plant construction boost after starting builds
- Request alliance help before using speedups
- Use for longer timers

Build Power.tip:
Queue long constructions in advance
- Complete during event for higher points
- Request alliance help before using speedups
- Use power plant boost after builds are active

Hero Skill.prepComment: Obtain Hero Skill Manuals from events, hero academy and rewards.
Hero Skill.tip:
Save skill books for event usage
- Upgrade during event window
- Prioritize key heroes

Chief Gear.prepComment: Obtain materials from Ghoulion and Partner Paradise.
Chief Gear.tip:
Save materials for Power Play
- Use as fallback to complete remaining rewards

Research Speed.tip:
Start research before applying boosts
- Activate research boost after starting
- Request alliance help before speedups

Research Power.tip:
Queue long research in advance
- Choose high battle point research
- Complete during event
- Use boosts after starting

Clash Medals.tip:
Spend during event on alliance duel research
- Earn points for both spending and research

Kill Troops.tip:
Engage in burrows, cities, Arcadia
- Coordinate with alliance for safer execution

Heal Speed.tip:
Heal troops in batches
- Use alliance help to reduce time
- Save speedups for RR

Use Stamina.tip:
Save stamina packs for event usage
- Avoid using outside events

Intel.prepComment: Complete only Venture/Maddie missions and store others.
Intel.tip:
Complete stored missions on event day
- Prevent overflow by clearing before reset

Collect Eggs.tip:
Focus on 10 and 20-min eggs
- Use single marches if needed

Recruit.prepComment: Get from events and infected kills.
Recruit.tip:
Save cards for event usage
- Use 10-pull for better value

Gather RSS.tip:
Send multiple marches
- Optimize hero distribution
- Reconfigure after gathering
